//: spawns at the survivor holdout from the doctor mission 5

dynamic_line: I hope those damn things don't come back for us...

responses.text: How did you end up here?

dynamic_line: Was just another day at work, was about to go on my patrol when someone came over the loudspeaker and announced an emergency evacuation.  'Course, I couldn't leave till we got all the eggheads out, so I was going to my station when I heard gunfire in the halls.  I peeked my head out and... and these things, these black things were tearing everyone up.  I don't know who or what they were, but they were surrounded by shadow, and I saw one of em shrug off a hit from a soldier's M4.  At that point, I knew this was above my paygrade, and I ran like hell, which is how I met up with the rest of the group, and we took shelter down here.
Sorry, I'm not going out there again.  Besides, these "geniuses" are the only way I'm getting out of here, and they couldn't shoot if their life depended upon it.
